overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating a rain-soaked neon-lit city at night. The player drives through tunnels, under overpasses, and busy city streets with holographic billboards and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete vehicle tunnel with red accent lighting

events.description: entering dark tunnel from city street, artificial red lighting becomes dominant
accelerating through the tunnel, passing other vehicles

agents.ego_description: driving through the wet tunnel, maintaining steady speed behind a yellow taxi

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving ahead with brake lights illuminated

entered.detail: rough concrete walls with red LED strip lighting running along the base
recessed overhead lights illuminating the tunnel interior
bright light visible at the far end of the tunnel indicating the exit

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the vehicle entering a concrete tunnel characterized by red accent lighting and wet asphalt. The camera moves steadily forward through the enclosed space, following a yellow taxi, with artificial lighting creating a dramatic cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with holographic billboards

events.description: exiting the tunnel into a large open intersection with bright neon signage
turning right at the intersection, navigating around other vehicles

agents.ego_description: navigating the turn at the intersection while observing the neon-lit surroundings

notable_agents.action: dark sedan waiting at the intersection to merge

entered.detail: massive illuminated advertising screen displaying colorful graphics above the road
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on wet asphalt
multi-story buildings with glass facades and neon accents

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel, the scene opens into a vast urban intersection bathed in neon light from massive digital billboards. The vehicle executes a right turn, navigating through the rain-slicked streets while the city skyline and holographic advertisements dominate the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with storefronts and sidewalk pedestrians

events.description: beginning to follow a boxy armored truck through the commercial district
passing groups of pedestrians on the sidewalk near illuminated shops

agents.ego_description: following the truck at moderate speed through the neon-lit commercial street, observing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: boxy armored delivery truck driving slowly ahead, blocking part of the lane
group of pedestrians standing and walking along the sidewalk near storefronts

entered.detail: ground-level shops with bright awnings and illuminated signage
tall palm trees lining the left side of the street
vertical neon signs in pink and blue hues attached to buildings

segments.scene_description: The vehicle follows a boxy armored truck through a bustling commercial street lined with neon-lit storefronts. Pedestrians populate the sidewalks, and palm trees line the avenue while holographic signs cast colorful reflections on the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered roadway beneath elevated highway overpass

events.description: entering covered roadway beneath massive concrete overpass structure
passing into shadow of overpass, artificial lighting becoming dominant

agents.ego_description: driving under the concrete overpass, following the truck through the dimly lit corridor

notable_agents.action: boxy truck continuing ahead under the overpass, brake lights visible

entered.detail: massive concrete pillars and horizontal beams supporting the highway above
bright orange metal railings lining the right side of the road
concrete walls covered in colorful graffiti and street art

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a covered roadway beneath a massive concrete overpass, with orange safety barriers lining the path and graffiti covering the walls. The lighting shifts to artificial sources as the sky becomes obscured by the overhead highway structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: city intersection with pedestrian crossing and traffic control

events.description: now following a silver sedan instead of the boxy truck
stopping at red traffic light as pedestrians cross the street
proceeding through intersection as traffic light changes to green

agents.ego_description: stopping at the intersection to allow pedestrians to cross, then proceeding

notable_agents.action: silver sedan stopped at the traffic light ahead
pedestrians crossing the street in front of the vehicle at the crosswalk

entered.detail: overhead traffic signal gantry with illuminated lights
small commercial building with distinctive red fabric awning
broad white striped pedestrian crossing lines

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered roadway, the vehicle follows a silver sedan to an intersection, stopping to allow pedestrians to cross at the marked crosswalk. The scene features a corner building with a red awning and active traffic control signals.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown commercial corridor with neon signage and wet streets

events.description: turning left at intersection, navigating through wet streets
passing through area with intense neon reflections on rain-slicked road

agents.ego_description: navigating through the city streets, making turns and observing the neon-lit environment

notable_agents.action: red sports car passing by on the left side of the street

entered.detail: tall buildings covered in bright pink and blue neon signage and advertisements
rain-slicked asphalt surface reflecting the colorful neon lights
curved elevated roadway structure with support columns

segments.scene_description: The final segment features driving through the heart of the cyberpunk city, with intense neon lights from surrounding buildings reflecting off the wet pavement. The vehicle navigates turns and passes other traffic while surrounded by towering structures covered in holographic advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from the enclosed confines of a concrete tunnel into the sprawling, neon-drenched heart of a futuristic city. It begins by gliding through a tunnel with red accent lighting and wet asphalt, following a yellow taxi before emerging into a vast urban intersection dominated by massive digital billboards and rain-slicked streets. The camera then tracks a boxy armored truck along a commercial avenue lined with palm trees and holographic signs, before the environment shifts again as the vehicle passes beneath a massive concrete overpass marked by graffiti and orange safety barriers. After exiting the covered roadway and pausing at a crosswalk beside a red-awninged building, the scene finally opens up into the city center, where towering structures and intense neon lights reflect vividly off the wet pavement.
